message:
✨ Improve search UX: rename Pages to Dashboards, pre-fill Add Card modal, add feedback routes (#2039)

* 🐛 Rename 'Pages' to 'Dashboards' in search results

The search dropdown labeled navigation items as 'Pages' but the
console uses 'Dashboards' terminology. Renamed the category label
and disambiguated custom dashboards as 'Custom Dashboards'.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Pre-fill Add Card modal from search and add feedback routes

- Pass card name as URL param (cardSearch) when clicking card results in
  global search, so Add Card modal opens pre-filtered to that card
- Add initialSearch prop to AddCardModal for pre-filling browse search
- Wire cardSearch URL param in Dashboard.tsx and DashboardPage.tsx
- Add /issues, /feedback routes opening the feedback dialog
- Add /feature, /features routes opening the feature request tab
- Add FeatureRedirect component and open-feedback-feature custom event
- Add initialRequestType prop to FeatureRequestModal

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix feedback dialog re-opening on navigation after /issues redirect

Use <Navigate> component + empty deps useEffect instead of useNavigate
in IssueRedirect/FeatureRedirect. The previous approach re-fired the
open-feedback event on subsequent navigations because the useEffect
depended on the navigate function reference.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ import { FeatureHintTooltip } from '../../ui/FeatureHintTooltip'
 const DISCOVERABLE_ROUTES = new Set(DISCOVERABLE_DASHBOARDS.map(d => d.href))
 
 const CATEGORY_CONFIG: Record<SearchCategory, { label: string; icon: typeof Server }> = {
-  page: { label: 'Pages', icon: LayoutDashboard },
+  page: { label: 'Dashboards', icon: LayoutDashboard },
   card: { label: 'Cards', icon: LayoutGrid },
   stat: { label: 'Stats', icon: BarChart3 },
   setting: { label: 'Settings', icon: Settings },
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ const CATEGORY_CONFIG: Record<SearchCategory, { label: string; icon: typeof Serv
   pod: { label: 'Pods', icon: Container },
   service: { label: 'Services', icon: Globe },
   mission: { label: 'AI Missions', icon: Bot },
-  dashboard: { label: 'Dashboards', icon: LayoutDashboard },
+  dashboard: { label: 'Custom Dashboards', icon: LayoutDashboard },
   helm: { label: 'Helm Releases', icon: Package },
   node: { label: 'Nodes', icon: HardDrive },
 }

@@ -297,7 +297,7 @@ const CATALOG_CARD_ITEMS: SearchItem[] = Object.entries(CARD_TITLES).map(([type,
   name: title,
   description: CARD_DESCRIPTIONS[type] || 'Available card',
   category: 'card' as SearchCategory,
-  href: '/?addCard=true',
+  href: `/?addCard=true&cardSearch=${encodeURIComponent(title)}`,
   keywords: [type, type.replace(/_/g, ' ')],
   meta: 'add card',
 }))
